position.title: Screen Position
position.description: Where to display this module on the mirror screen.

interval.title: Update Interval (Seconds)
interval.description: Time to wait between state updates.

url.title: Home Assistant URL
url.description: The base URL of your local Home Assistant instance.

token.title: Long-Lived Access Token
token.description: Long-Lived Access Token created in your Home Assistant profile settings.

heading.title: Custom Heading
heading.description: Custom title to display as the module header (overrides default).

show_header.title: Show Header
show_header.description: Show or hide the module's header/title.

layout.title: Layout Style
layout.description: Choose between 'detailed' (large display of sensor with sub-values) or 'compact' (vertical dense list of entities with inline metadata).

entities.title: Tracked Entities
entities.description: List of Home Assistant entity IDs to display.

entity_id.title: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The full entity ID from Home Assistant (e.g. sensor.living_room_temp, light.kitchen).

custom_name.title: Custom Name (Optional)
custom_name.description: Override the friendly name from Home Assistant.

custom_icon.title: Custom Lucide Icon (Optional)
custom_icon.description: Lucide icon name to show next to this entity (e.g., thermometer, lightbulb, home). If omitted, falls back to a default based on entity domain.
